'''gangusu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pseudoangiomatosis|pseudoangiomatosis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-ng-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pseudoangiomatosis|pseudoangiomatosis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| gangusu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gængisith|gængisith]] || [[word:gængisij|gængisij]] || [[word:gængisish|gængisish]] || [[word:gængisi|gængisi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gangungusuth|gangungusuth]] || [[word:gangungusuj|gangungusuj]] || [[word:gangungusush|gangungusush]] || [[word:gangungusu|gangungusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gangusuth|gangusuth]] || [[word:gangusuj|gangusuj]] || [[word:gangusush|gangusush]] || [[word:gangusu|gangusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gangufsufth|gangufsufth]] || [[word:gangufsufj|gangufsufj]] || [[word:gangufsufsh|gangufsufsh]] || [[word:gangufsuf|gangufsuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gangusuthu|gangusuthu]] || [[word:gangusuju|gangusuju]] || [[word:gangusushu|gangusushu]] || [[word:gangusuku|gangusuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gangusuth|gangusuth]] || [[word:gangusuj|gangusuj]] || [[word:gangusush|gangusush]] || [[word:gangusu|gangusu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gangusuthul|gangusuthul]] || [[word:gangusujul|gangusujul]] || [[word:gangusushul|gangusushul]] || [[word:gangusukul|gangusukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gangusuuthuthu|gangusuuthuthu]] || [[word:gangusuujuju|gangusuujuju]] || [[word:gangusuushushu|gangusuushushu]] || [[word:gangusuuku|gangusuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gangusuthun|gangusuthun]] || [[word:gangusujun|gangusujun]] || [[word:gangusushun|gangusushun]] || [[word:gangusukun|gangusukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gangusuthuoro|gangusuthuoro]] || [[word:gangusujuoro|gangusujuoro]] || [[word:gangusushuoro|gangusushuoro]] || [[word:gangusukuoro|gangusukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|effa290}}
